name: Atolio
what: AI-powered enterprise search that indexes Slack, Google Drive, Confluence, Jira and other work apps with document-level permissions into a customer-controlled VPC/on-prem index, then answers questions across them; deployed privately (AWS/Azure/GCP/OpenShift).
why_tier: Cross-SaaS search + answers + source-permission mirroring is the whole product = Astell's exact lane; private/self-hosted deployment is the wedge.
notes: $24M total, Series A Sep 2025 (Translink Capital lead; IBM Ventures, Bloomberg Beta, Acorn Pacific, Parameter). Founders ex-Splunk/PagerDuty. Customers: US Air Force, Cengage, Cribl. HQ city unconfirmed (US).

name: Squirro
what: Enterprise GenAI platform combining semantic enterprise search, knowledge graphs and conversational AI on a RAG architecture over a company's fragmented internal knowledge; markets explicit 'enterprise search' + 'knowledge management' offerings.
why_tier: Cross-knowledge search + answers + graph over org's own data = Tier-1 mechanics; heavy financial-services concentration and insights framing give it a data-intel lean, but the core promise matches Astell.
notes: Swiss; teams in CH/US/UK/Singapore. Gartner 2025 Market Guide for Enterprise AI Search vendor; acquired Synaptica (KG management) 2024. Customers: ECB, Bank of England, HMRC, Standard Chartered, Henkel. Exact funding stage unconfirmed; mature 12-yr private co.

name: Blockbrain
what: Modular enterprise AI platform that captures expert/tacit knowledge into 'digital knowledge twins' and AI agents ('Knowledge Bots') to make company know-how permanently accessible across teams; GDPR/ISO 27001, multi-model, EU AI Act-oriented.
why_tier: Same 'company knowledge made usable by AI' promise as Astell but in an expertise-capture/knowledge-preservation perimeter (Interloom-adjacent) rather than live cross-tool ingest; one connector-set shift from Tier 1.
notes: €17.5M Series A (Alstin Capital + 13books Capital lead; HARTING Family Foundation), ~€23M total. Customers: Bosch, Roland Berger, Kaercher, Harting, fischer. 5x revenue growth 2025. Founding year unconfirmed.
